config.label: Google Gemini API Key
config.help: Get your API key at https://aistudio.google.com/apikey

marketplace.tagline: Generate AI images from text prompts using Gemini
marketplace.long_description: Create images on the fly with Google Gemini — just describe what you want. Use flash mode for quick drafts or pro mode for higher quality. Reply to any photo to use it as a reference for variations and edits.
